title: Gits And Shiggles
description: Funny gimmicky items. Used in my server but you too, can now experience the chaos!
body:
About

Adds a series of gimmicky items like lightsabers, becoming santa and really big pngs. Purely for fun and are very NOT balanced. All items also have unique drawbacks. See the [Wiki](https://github.com/Midget807/Gits-And-Shiggles/wiki) for more information on these items. ![Overview](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/efaa10ec588fbc967d5f3ed4f6d491ca912fa34c.png)

Items

- Big png of a rifle - Railgun with a LOT of recoil - Santa Hats to become santa and summon elves (Based on Doctor4t's rats) - Flamethrower - Dice that causes random events (see the wiki) - Egg that spawns a random mob - Infinity Gauntlet - Inverted Trident that riptides no matter the condition... just backwards - Katana that can parry damage - Wizard clothes that allow you to vanish
